channel.title: PBR on T Fong
channel.description: Recent content in PBR on T Fong

item.title: OpenGL Monte Carlo Pathtracer
item.author: tfong@seas.upenn.edu (T Fong)
item.description: An OpenGL GLSL Monte Carlo Pathtracer featuring diffuse and specular reflective and transmissive materials, compound BSDFs (e.g. glass), multiple importance sampling (MIS), and depth of field via thin lens approximation.

item.title: Physically-Based Deferred Renderer
item.author: tfong@seas.upenn.edu (T Fong)
item.description: A physically-based deferred renderer in OpenGL and GLSL, with diffuse and glossy convolution for environment map reflections on materials with roughness and metallic factors, and deferred rendering for screen space reflections
